highlights.name: Jade Room Roast Duck
highlights.description: Crisp skin, five-spice perfume, plum caramel and pickled cucumber.
highlights.imageAlt: Crisp roast duck slices with plum glaze and pickled cucumber on a jade ceramic plate

highlights.name: Typhoon Shelter Prawns
highlights.description: Golden garlic crumb, chilli, scallion and warm wok smoke.
highlights.imageAlt: Typhoon shelter prawns with golden garlic crumb, chilli and scallion

highlights.name: Silken Tofu, Black Bean
highlights.description: Steamed tofu, fermented black bean, ginger oil and brassica greens.
highlights.imageAlt: Silken tofu with black bean sauce, ginger oil and greens in a jade bowl

highlights.name: Char Siu Pork Collar
highlights.description: Cognac glaze, sesame, mustard greens and charred spring onion.
highlights.imageAlt: Glossy char siu pork collar with sesame, greens and charred spring onion

highlights.name: XO Noodles
highlights.description: House XO, egg noodles, Chinese celery and wok-fried aromatics.
highlights.imageAlt: XO egg noodles with scallion, chilli and wok-fried aromatics

highlights.name: Mango Pomelo Sago
highlights.description: Chilled mango, citrus, coconut cream and pomelo pearls.
highlights.imageAlt: Mango pomelo sago dessert with coconut cream and pomelo pearls

sections.label: A La Carte
sections.intro: The full Jade Room shared menu, from appetizers and dumplings to live seafood, roasts, clay pots, vegetables, rice and noodles.
sections.imageAlt: Roast duck and char siu sharing plate on dark timber with jade ceramics

items.name: Home-made Spring Rolls (4)

items.name: Peking Duck - 2 Courses
items.description: Freshly prepared in-house daily, roasted until crisp and served with pancakes. Course two choice of duck san choy bao, roast duck, duck fried rice or noodle, or duck stir fry.

items.name: Lobster
items.description: Market priced live lobster. Cooking styles include sashimi, supreme broth, typhoon shelter style, garlic butter, golden spicy, salt and pepper.

items.name: Coral Trout
items.description: Market priced live coral trout. Steamed with ginger and shallot, or filleted and wok fried with snow peas.

items.name: Abalone
items.description: Market priced live abalone. Steamed thinly sliced in shell, or poached in broth.

items.name: Mud Crab
items.description: Market priced live mud crab. Ginger and shallot, Singaporean, salt and pepper, typhoon shelter style, black pepper and butter, golden egg yolk, or egg yolk and vermicelli.

items.name: King Crab
items.description: Market priced live king crab. Black pepper and butter, salt and pepper, typhoon shelter style, steamed with Hua Diao, or wok fried with foie gras for an extra cost.

items.name: Snow Crab
items.description: Market priced live snow crab. Steamed with Hua Diao, or wok fried with black pepper and butter.

sections.label: Banquet
sections.intro: Shared menus for groups, celebrations and long-table dining.
sections.imageAlt: Private dining room with long marble table, lanterns and pop art

items.name: Jade Banquet
items.description: Dim sum selection, roast duck, silken tofu, XO noodles and mango pomelo sago.

items.name: Supper Club Banquet
items.description: Seafood starters, typhoon shelter prawns, char siu pork collar, seasonal greens and dessert.

items.name: Celebration Banquet
items.description: A larger shared feast with premium roasts, seafood, banquet sides and dessert course.
